svg.title: The Tinkerer’s Fibonacci Notes — Audited Master Vector Layout
svg.desc: A single audited SVG master sheet for later identical-geometry line-art and quill-parchment PNG renders. It separates exact Fibonacci recurrence, finite ratios, metaphorical normalized time, geometric spiral approximation, and empirical reality-claim testing.

text.tspan: Shows: seed addresses, duplicate-one hinge, and dependency arrows.
Says: D_v is produced from the previous two destinations.
Complete for near horizon Fv -1 through Fv 12.

svg.text: truth boundary: process step ≠ destination value

text.tspan: Shows: finite forward ratios oscillating toward φ.
Says: point labels are finite values; φ is a limit line.
line segments connect observations; no smooth curve
Shows: a normalized interpretive number line.
Says: the intervals around today are unequal.
FUTURE-SIDE INTERVAL IS φ TIMES THE PAST-SIDE INTERVAL
Says: arcs are quarter-circles inside true squares.
NOT AN EXACT LOGARITHMIC GOLDEN SPIRAL
Shows four exact-structure reminders with a concrete example or test.
Says they are theorem cues, not decorative islands.

svg.text: EACH IDENTITY REQUIRES ITS STATED INDEXING

text.tspan: Shows an evaluation frame, not a verdict.
Says every reality claim needs data, rivals, residuals, and status.
Shows the page rules as marginalia: each note is an audit guardrail, not filler.

svg.text: THE FUTURE TERM IS IMPLICIT IN THE SEEDS AND RULE
KNOWN FROM KNOWN, NOT CAUSED BY MAGIC
THE DUPLICATE ONE IS A HINGE
